productDisplayName: Police Men Black Dial Chronograph Watch PL12777JSG02M
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular stainless steel case, has a fixed bezel with markings and a tachymeterDial style: Black dialFeatures: A screw to reset the time, three-faced chronograph display, a date aperture, push buttons to adjust the settingsStrap style: Gold-toned metallic bracelet-style strap secured with a foldover claspWater-resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Police caseWarranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects from the date of purchase
